description: F2 conversation pin/unpin — GROUP leg (hermetic): create a group, pin its conversation via l3_set_pinned(group_<gid>), assert the gid enters l3_dump_state.pinnedConversations, unpin, assert it's gone, then leave the group (self-clean). Complements S84 (the C2C pin leg) — pinning is valid for both C2C and group conversations and the pinned set stores 'group_<normalizedGid>'. Hermetic — local Prefs state, no peer. Maps to feature F2 (group leg).
